title: Kemardolla
description:
A vanilla like modpack with a twist! 
Various small but curious additions that will provide a simple but fun experience
body:
This modpack builds upon the classic and core values of Minecraft with plenty of small but entertaining mods to provide a fun but relaxing experience. Most of the mods either add small features, animals or decorative building blocks. 
This pack is only intended to be utilised by members of Kemardolla however if the listed mods seem like your style, try it out and enjoy!
